message:
chore(beads): enable sync-branch configuration

Set sync-branch to "main" in .beads/config.yaml to enable
`bd sync` to work without requiring manual configuration or
environment variables each session.

This change was previously committed in c859ad2 but was
overwritten by a subsequent `bd sync` operation. The beads
sync mechanism manages sync_base.jsonl automatically, but
config.yaml settings need to be committed separately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,7 +42,7 @@
 # This setting persists across clones (unlike database config which is gitignored).
 # Can also use BEADS_SYNC_BRANCH env var for local override.
 # If not set, bd sync will require you to run 'bd config set sync.branch <branch>'.
-# sync-branch: "beads-sync"
+sync-branch: "main"
 
 # Multi-repo configuration (experimental - bd-307)
 # Allows hydrating from multiple repositories and routing writes to the correct JSONL
@@ -59,4 +59,4 @@
 # - linear.url
 # - linear.api-key
 # - github.org
-# - github.repo
+# - github.repo
\ No newline at end of file
